name: wanxiangshu
description: wanxiangshu: multi-agent plugin runtime in F#→JS via Fable

scripts.build-and-test: dotnet fable wanxiangshu.fsproj --outDir build && rm -f build/fable_modules/.gitignore && cp build-package.json build/package.json && mkdir -p build/e2e && cp e2e/harness.js e2e/mock-llm.js e2e/stealth-mcp-fixture.js e2e/omp-runner.js e2e/omp-harness.js e2e/omp-driver.ts build/e2e/ && mkdir -p build/e2e/omp-driver && cp e2e/omp-driver/*.ts build/e2e/omp-driver/ && node tests/runner.js
scripts.e2e: dotnet fable wanxiangshu.fsproj --outDir build --noCache && rm -f build/fable_modules/.gitignore && cp build-package.json build/package.json && mkdir -p build/e2e && cp e2e/*.js build/e2e/ && node tests/runner.js --e2e
scripts.e2e-omp: dotnet fable wanxiangshu.fsproj --outDir build --noCache && rm -f build/fable_modules/.gitignore && cp build-package.json build/package.json && mkdir -p build/e2e && cp e2e/harness.js e2e/mock-llm.js e2e/stealth-mcp-fixture.js e2e/omp-runner.js e2e/omp-harness.js e2e/omp-driver.ts build/e2e/ && mkdir -p build/e2e/omp-driver && cp e2e/omp-driver/*.ts build/e2e/omp-driver/ && node tests/runner.js --e2e-omp
